quotes.text: 学习不是为了考试，而是为了成长。
quotes.author: 爱因斯坦

quotes.text: 学而时习之，不亦说乎。
quotes.author: 孔子

quotes.text: 温故而知新，可以为师矣。
quotes.author: 孔子

quotes.text: 知之为知之，不知为不知，是知也。
quotes.author: 孔子

quotes.text: 学而不思则罔，思而不学则殆。
quotes.author: 孔子

quotes.text: 不积跬步，无以至千里；不积小流，无以成江海。
quotes.author: 荀子

quotes.text: Learning is not the product of teaching. Learning is the product of the activity of learners.
quotes.author: John Holt

quotes.text: Tell me and I forget, teach me and I remember, involve me and I learn.
quotes.author: Benjamin Franklin

quotes.text: The more that you read, the more things you will know. The more that you learn, the more places you'll go.
quotes.author: Dr. Seuss

quotes.text: Education is the most powerful weapon which you can use to change the world.
quotes.author: Nelson Mandela

quotes.text: The beautiful thing about learning is that nobody can take it away from you.
quotes.author: B.B. King

quotes.text: Live as if you were to die tomorrow. Learn as if you were to live forever.
quotes.author: Mahatma Gandhi

quotes.text: Knowledge is power.
quotes.author: Francis Bacon

quotes.text: 天道酬勤。
业精于勤，荒于嬉；行成于思，毁于随。
quotes.author: 韩愈

quotes.text: 书山有路勤为径，学海无涯苦作舟。
quotes.author: 韩愈

quotes.text: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
quotes.author: Socrates

quotes.text: It does not matter how slowly you go as long as you do not stop.
quotes.author: Confucius

quotes.text: The mind is not a vessel to be filled, but a fire to be kindled.
quotes.author: Plutarch

quotes.text: Study without desire spoils the memory, and it retains nothing that it takes in.
quotes.author: Leonardo da Vinci

quotes.text: I have no special talent. I am only passionately curious.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: 千里之行，始于足下。
quotes.author: 老子

quotes.text: Learning never exhausts the mind.
quotes.author: Leonardo da Vinci

quotes.text: The capacity to learn is a gift; the ability to learn is a skill; the willingness to learn is a choice.
quotes.author: Brian Herbert

quotes.text: You don't understand anything until you learn it more than one way.
quotes.author: Marvin Minsky
